[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ bottom_divider_style=”wave2″ bottom_divider_color=”#f5e9ad” bottom_divider_height=”50px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_code _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]In your html page, add the snippet and call gtag_report_conversion when someone clicks on the chosen link or button. –>[/et_pb_fullwidth_code][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”Mini Party Set Menu” text_orientation=”center” _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.5)” background_image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/LXC1-031.jpg” background_blend=”overlay” custom_padding=”||88px|||” title_text_shadow_style=”preset1″ title_text_shadow_color=”#e02b20″ global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Buffet Catering Services

To provide the best buffet catering in Singapore, we have our own team of highly trained chefs to ensure each dish is cooked to perfection while keep our pledge of no MSG, Preservatives, less salt and 100% vegetable oil. Please browse our buffet catering menu below with 3 menus to ensure you get the ideal buffet catering service of your choice. Buffet in Singapore has never been easier when you cater from the best caterer in Singapore with more than 100 dishes to choose from. For additional customization on your menus, please do not hesitate to call us at 68159119 or email us at enquiry@houseofcatering.com.sg, as one of the best buffet catering in Singapore, you can be ensure that your needs will be met. Feel free to engage our buffet services regardless of your occasion, be it a casual family gathering, birthday for the old or young, a once in a lifetime wedding or corporate event or seminar, you can be assured that all your needs and requirements will be met to perfection.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” custom_padding=”0px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_4,1_4,1_4,1_4″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ width=”100%” module_alignment=”center” custom_margin=”-4px|auto||auto||” custom_padding=”0px|||||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Oriental Chinese Mini Party Set” url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjEzMjgifX0=@” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Oriental-Chinese.png” _builder_version=”4.16″ _dynamic_attributes=”url” text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$167 6 Courses (8 Pax)
